name: IIJ GIO
description: Internet Initiative Japans enterprise cloud — private/hybrid IaaS, storage and ExpressRoute-style connectivity.

seo.title: IIJ GIO — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: IIJ GIO: Internet Initiative Japans enterprise cloud — private/hybrid IaaS, storage and ExpressRoute-style connectivity.

when_to_use: Enterprise-grade IaaS with Japanese network connectivity
Private and hybrid cloud for Japanese regulated industries
Managed databases and storage with Japanese support SLAs
ExpressRoute-style private connectivity to Japanese cloud
Compliant cloud hosting for financial and medical sectors in Japan

pros: Strong private and hybrid cloud story
review.verdict: A trustworthy Japanese enterprise cloud for hybrid deployments, not a self-serve dev platform.
review.best_for: Japanese enterprises building private and hybrid cloud setups
review.not_for: Self-serve developers wanting modern PaaS and global regions

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing scales up and down.
